contract.C1: FFO #40-49 full window; #45-49 may use a recorded node cap
contract.E50Bound: largest empties where >=50% complete at least one standard proof window
contract.E50Exact: largest empties where >=50% complete both proofs with summed nodes <= budget

speed20To24.note: Informative pre-commit-harness timing retained by redo ruling; the formal warmup plus three alternating-order repetitions run is deferred to T108.
